import tempfile
import os


def process_upload(file_data: bytes) -> str:
    tmp = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False, suffix=".csv")
    try:
        tmp.write(file_data)
        tmp.flush()
        tmp.close()
        result = parse_csv(tmp.name)
    except Exception as e:
        if os.path.exists(tmp.name):
            os.unlink(tmp.name)
        raise
    os.unlink(tmp.name)
    return result


def generate_report(data: dict) -> str:
    tmp = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False, suffix=".json")
    try:
        tmp.write(str(data).encode())
        tmp.flush()
        tmp.close()
        result = render_pdf(tmp.name)
    except Exception as e:
        if os.path.exists(tmp.name):
            os.unlink(tmp.name)
        raise
    os.unlink(tmp.name)
    return result


def export_snapshot(records: list) -> str:
    tmp = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False, suffix=".json")
    try:
        import json
        tmp.write(json.dumps(records).encode())
        tmp.flush()
        tmp.close()
        result = upload_to_s3(tmp.name)
    except Exception as e:
        if os.path.exists(tmp.name):
            os.unlink(tmp.name)
        raise
    os.unlink(tmp.name)
    return result
